mapper.select: select o.order_id, o.delivery_id, o.customer_id, c.name as customer_name, c.phone as customer_phone, o.total_amount, o.remark from biz_customer_order o left join biz_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id where o.delivery_id = #{deliveryId} order by o.order_id

select o.order_id, o.delivery_id, d.delivery_date, r.route_name, d.status as delivery_status, o.customer_id, c.name as customer_name, c.phone as customer_phone, o.total_amount, o.remark from biz_customer_order o left join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id left join biz_route r on d.route_id = r.route_id left join biz_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id where o.customer_id = #{customerId} order by d.delivery_date desc, o.order_id desc
